steps.instruction: Freeze scope, identities, authority, verification, rollback, and stop conditions before work begins.
rollback: Return to planned state without mutation.
stop_conditions: Stop when any required identity or authority is unresolved.
steps.title: Preflight and identity freeze
verification: Confirm exact identities and rollback readiness are recorded.

steps.instruction: Capture the bounded raw source and preserve immutable intake evidence outside canonical Source.
rollback: Discard untrusted local derivatives while retaining capture evidence.
stop_conditions: Stop on secret detection, unresolved access, or unsafe evidence.
steps.title: Immutable intake
verification: Confirm the capture identity and audience are reproducible.

steps.instruction: Prepare a closed evidence-bound synthesis request with exact provider and harness identities.
rollback: Abandon the request and retain its immutable evidence.
stop_conditions: Stop when provider, model, prompt, harness, seed, or evidence identity is missing.
steps.title: Synthesis preparation
verification: Confirm request identity binds the exact capture and configuration.

steps.instruction: Validate strict model output against exact normalized evidence spans before resolution.
rollback: Reject invalid output and prepare a new request rather than editing evidence.
stop_conditions: Stop on unsupported claims, invalid spans, malformed JSON, or identity mismatch.
steps.title: Synthesis validation
verification: Confirm every supported claim maps to exact evidence.

steps.instruction: Resolve the validated proposal against an exact canonical Source checkout and preserve conflicts.
rollback: Return the proposal for revision without touching Source.
stop_conditions: Stop on Source drift, unresolved contradiction, or audience broadening.
steps.title: Source resolution
verification: Confirm resolution binds exact Source and synthesis identities.

steps.instruction: Record an explicit named human decision for the exact resolution and effective audience.
rollback: Record needs_changes or rejected and return to the relevant preparation stage.
stop_conditions: Stop unless every proposal is explicitly decided by an authorized reviewer.
steps.title: Human review decision
verification: Confirm reviewer, timestamp, notes, decision, and audience are complete.

steps.instruction: Materialize a bounded Source change package from approved immutable review evidence.
rollback: Discard the package and preserve the decision evidence.
stop_conditions: Stop on stale Source SHA, incomplete decisions, quarantine, or policy broadening.
steps.title: Source package
verification: Confirm the package grants no canonical or GitHub write authority.

steps.command_template: Open a reviewed Source pull request from <SOURCE_PACKAGE_ID> against exact <EXPECTED_SOURCE_SHA>; merge only after explicit approval and required Source checks.
steps.instruction: Open and merge the reviewed Source change through the canonical Source repository boundary.
rollback: Revert only through a new reviewed Source PR; never rewrite trusted history.
stop_conditions: Stop on stale base, failed checks, missing approval, or package drift.
steps.title: Canonical Source PR
verification: Confirm merged commit equals the reviewed package and expected Source parent.

steps.instruction: Validate the exact canonical Source commit and its metadata, provenance, links, and audience.
rollback: Correct Source through a new reviewed PR.
stop_conditions: Stop on invalid metadata, links, provenance, review, identity, or audience.
steps.title: Source validation
verification: Confirm the exact Source commit passes deterministic validation.

steps.instruction: Publish immutable candidate artifacts only within the bounded candidate channel.
rollback: Leave production unchanged and supersede or retire the candidate through governed lifecycle state.
stop_conditions: Stop on Source, Builder, Foundation, channel, manifest, or object identity drift.
steps.title: Candidate publication
verification: Confirm candidate objects and manifest are immutable and checksummed.

steps.instruction: Run runtime, citation, ACL, regression, and quality acceptance against the exact candidate.
rollback: Reject the candidate while preserving production and acceptance evidence.
stop_conditions: Stop on any failed runtime, citation, ACL, regression, or quality gate.
steps.title: Candidate acceptance

steps.instruction: Commit and validate an exact request that binds target and expected-previous production identities.
rollback: Replace the request through a reviewed PR before approval; never edit approved evidence in place.
stop_conditions: Stop on missing target, expected previous, operation, query, citation, or actor identity.
steps.title: Promotion request
verification: Confirm control-plane SHA is runtime supplied and absent from committed request data.

steps.command_template: Review <PROMOTION_REQUEST_IDENTITY> and record explicit bounded production approval with verification and rollback readiness.
steps.instruction: Record explicit human approval for one exact operation without dispatching production.
rollback: Reject or supersede approval before dispatch through immutable evidence.
stop_conditions: Stop when scope, request identity, rollback, or verification plan is ambiguous.
steps.title: Production approval
verification: Confirm approval binds the exact request and operation identity.

steps.command_template: Dispatch .github/workflows/m5-production-promotion.yml with request_path=<REQUEST_PATH> only after environment approval confirms <PRODUCTION_APPROVAL_EVIDENCE>.
steps.instruction: Dispatch only the governed production workflow and allow only its checked atomic pointer mutation.
rollback: Use the governed rollback path bound to the recorded previous pointer and a bounded authorization.
stop_conditions: Stop on stale pointer, request drift, replay conflict, failed candidate verification, or absent approval.
steps.title: Production promotion
verification: Confirm receipt, exact pointer transition, target manifest, and operation journal.

steps.instruction: Verify active release, manifest, cache, public answer, citations, and ACL-negative behavior.
rollback: Enter the governed rollback or incident path when verification fails.
stop_conditions: Stop on release, manifest, cache, query, citation, ACL, or health mismatch.
steps.title: Runtime verification
verification: Confirm runtime is bound to the promoted release and all requested checks pass.

steps.command_template: Use only the production workflow ledger renderer to append verified evidence for <OPERATION_ID> to permanent ledger issue #30.
steps.instruction: Append bounded production evidence only through the explicit permanent-ledger contract.
rollback: Do not delete or rewrite ledger history; append correction evidence only under its own contract.
stop_conditions: Stop when promotion evidence is incomplete, private, mismatched, or unverified.
steps.title: Permanent ledger evidence
verification: Confirm issue #30 remains open and the entry matches verified workflow evidence.

steps.instruction: Advance the governed batch by one adjacent transition into closed state using exact versions.
rollback: Use lifecycle correction or reconciliation contracts; never edit registry state directly.
stop_conditions: Stop on stale versions, incomplete lifecycle, production mismatch, or missing ledger reference.
steps.title: Batch closeout
verification: Confirm the closeout receipt binds exact batch, registry, production, and ledger identities.

steps.instruction: Audit terminal lifecycle, production, candidate, permit, registry, and ledger continuity.
rollback: Reopen investigation through governed lifecycle evidence when reconciliation is blocked.
stop_conditions: Do not declare completion while any lifecycle, production, candidate, permit, or ledger inconsistency remains.
steps.title: Final reconciliation
verification: Confirm the batch is closed and every identity is traceable from capture to production evidence.
